message:
docs: refresh pattern audit timestamp after Railway pattern update

The pattern-audit document is regenerated by the audit tooling and
embeds a `Generated: <iso8601>` line. The detector content is otherwise
identical to the prior generated copy; this commit only carries the
timestamp bump produced by re-running the audit after the
`railway-api-volume-detach` pattern was widened in the previous commit
to cover the GraphQL variables payload.

Kept as a separate commit so the diff against the main change set
stays small and the audit refresh is trivially reversible if the
generator output changes again before the next release.
